products.name: Ember Rope Tug
products.blurb: braided cotton tug toy that outlasts the most determined jaws.
products.description: A two-knot tug of tightly braided cotton, sized for medium jaws. Machine washable, dye-free, and rated for daily fetch-and-wrestle duty. If your dog shreds it inside a year, we replace it — that has happened twice, ever.

products.name: Cloudloaf Cat Bed
products.blurb: a memory-foam donut your cat will claim before you finish unboxing.
products.description: Sixty centimetres of slow-rebound foam with a raised rim for chin-resting. The cover zips off and survives the washing machine; the anti-slip base survives midnight zoomies. Available in oat — cats have opinions, we kept it simple.

products.name: Pecky's Seed Sticks
products.blurb: honey-baked millet sticks for parakeets — three per pack.
products.description: Millet, canary seed, and a thin honey glaze, baked onto a natural wood core. Clips onto any cage bar. No artificial colours, because your bird genuinely does not care what colour breakfast is.

products.name: Trailblazer No-Pull Harness
products.blurb: a no-pull harness with reflective seams for early-morning walks.
products.description: Front-clip design that steers enthusiasm instead of fighting it. Padded chest plate, four adjustment points, and 360° reflective stitching. Fits medium builds 55–75 cm around the chest; other sizes on request.

products.name: Whisker Wand
products.blurb: a feather teaser wand engineered for maximum pounce.
products.description: Ninety centimetres of flexible fibreglass with a replaceable natural-feather lure on a braided cord. Five minutes a day keeps the 3 a.m. sprints (mostly) at bay. Refill lures sold in store.

products.name: Burrow Buddy Hideout
products.blurb: a natural cork hideout for hamsters and other small landlords.
products.description: A hollow cork arch, sanded smooth and untreated — safe to chew, cool in summer, warm in winter. Roomy enough for a hamster, a pair of mice, or one dramatic gerbil. Every piece has its own grain; yours will be one of a kind.
